title: aleawol 1L Glass Barrel Dispenser with Tap, Glass Whiskey Barrel Decanter with Wooden Stand Whiskey Decanter Barrel Drink Dispenser for Bourbon Vodka Tequila Wine
features: Quality glass wine barrel: The glass wine barrel is made of high quality and durable lead-free glass material, as well as the ABS tap design, which provides quality assurance for the product. The tap dispenses water smoothly and is not easy to leak. Ready to use, convenient and quick to use

Large diameter spout and cork: The glass barrel dispenser has large diameter spout design allows you to mix drinks with fruit easily. Making it very easy to use and clean. Glass drink dispenser also has a wooden stopper which keeps out dust and water vapour well, allowing you to use the glass drink dispenser for longer

Base design: The bamboo wooden base makes the glass barrel dispenser more stable to place and less likely to slip off. Practical and doesn't take up much space. You can easily place it in various places, such as the family kitchen, living room, balcony or recreation room, and enjoy a cold drink anytime, anywhere

Simple and beautiful: The whisky dispenser with tap features a stylish pineapple pattern design that can easily match a variety of decorative styles. The glass beverage dispenser allows you to clearly see the drink you have made, adding a sense of ritual to your life

Wide range of applications: Glass beverage barrel can be used to refrigerate and store a wide range of beverages such as fruit juices, fruit teas and infused wines. As well as storage for hot drinks up to 75°C. Glass beverage barrel also helps you to experiment freely with new drink combinations, allowing you to easily DIY a variety of drinks at home. You can use it all year round
